title: I Release Old Money Judgements and Allow a Loving Relationship
subtitle: An energy statement for clearing the moral weight carried about money and wealth
excerpt: A short energy statement for when judgement about money (yours or others') is blocking your relationship with prosperity. The release names the specific moral frame; the allow points toward money as a trustworthy, neutral partner.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 67 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement for the moral judgements about money that can quietly block a healthy money life. The release names those old frames: money as corrupt, as risky, as a test of character. The allow points toward money as a neutral partner that simply reflects your values.
I am ready to release every old judgement about money: that it is bad, that it changes people, that wanting more makes me someone I am not. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow a loving, respectful relationship with money as a neutral tool that reflects my values and does good in my hands. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 67 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
